entities.name: MNIST
entities.description: Handwritten-digit images; the canonical small vision benchmark.

entities.name: ImageNet (ILSVRC)
entities.description: Large-scale labelled image database that catalysed deep learning for vision.

entities.name: Google News corpus
entities.description: Large internal news-text corpus used to train word2vec embeddings.

entities.name: WMT'14 English–French
entities.description: Standard machine-translation benchmark, English to French.

entities.name: WMT'14 English–German
entities.description: Standard machine-translation benchmark, English to German.

entities.name: BookCorpus
entities.description: Free novels used for unsupervised language-model pretraining.

entities.name: English Wikipedia
entities.description: Encyclopaedic text widely used for pretraining.

entities.name: Common Crawl (filtered)
entities.description: Web-scale text corpus, filtered, used to train large language models.

entities.name: JFT-300M
entities.description: Very large internal Google image dataset used for large-scale pretraining.

entities.name: Image Classification
entities.description: Assign a category label to an image.

entities.name: Representation Learning
entities.description: Learn reusable feature representations, often without labels.

entities.name: Word Representation
entities.description: Learn dense vector representations of words.

entities.name: Machine Translation
entities.description: Translate text from one language into another.

entities.name: Language Modeling
entities.description: Predict the next token in a sequence of text.

entities.name: Language Understanding
entities.description: Downstream natural-language understanding tasks (e.g. GLUE).

entities.name: cuda-convnet
entities.description: Krizhevsky's high-performance CUDA convolutional-network code.

entities.name: DistBelief
entities.description: Google's first-generation large-scale distributed deep-learning framework.

entities.name: Theano
entities.description: Early Python framework for symbolic math and GPU deep learning.

entities.name: TensorFlow
entities.description: Open-source machine-learning framework from Google.

entities.name: JAX
entities.description: NumPy-compatible autodiff + XLA compilation for ML research.
